planetView.manualMiningDescription: Only one mining mode can be active at a time. Switch focus when a chain becomes the bottleneck.

upgradePanel.mineMoreToUnlock: Mine more {resource} to unlock this path.
upgradePanel.craftingUnlockHint: Crafting unlocks once enough raw extraction has happened to support refinement.
upgradePanel.automationUnlockHint: Automation opens after the early manual loop starts feeding refined materials.
upgradePanel.automationUnavailable: No automation unlocked for this resource yet.

saveTransferDialog.copyError: Clipboard access failed. Copy the save code manually.

settingsDialog.title: Settings
settingsDialog.languageDescription: Choose the interface language. The app reloads after switching so game content is rebuilt in the selected locale.
settingsDialog.saveDescription: Back up progress to a file, copy a transfer code, or restore a saved run from file or code.
settingsDialog.resetDescription: Clear the current run and start over. This still opens a confirmation step before data is erased.

startScreen.title: Frontier Miner
startScreen.description: Start a new expedition from local storage or import a save file before entering orbit.
startScreen.importError: The selected file is not a valid save.
startScreen.importReadError: The selected file could not be read.
